# (Last Chance) Get 10% OFF on WordPress Professional Services

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-12-05 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 363

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Our Black Friday Sale is almost over.

Now is the LAST CHANCE to get WPBeginner Pro Services for a flat
10% OFF.

All you have to do is to purchase the right WordPress service you
want and enter the following coupon during checkout: 24BFCM

Here are some of the professional WordPress services we offer:

1. WordPress Website Design 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GxzAJM1SFPbHKsW2hBCtVBxG2cVTOnWK7z2x37yH0js )
(Get 10% OFF)

Want to get a new website design or rebuild an established site?

Either way, you can get yourself a brand-new WordPress website
for an affordable price.

You’ll also get a dedicated project manager who can ensure that
you get the site design you’ve always dreamed of.

2. WordPress Maintenance & Tech Help 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.jMGmTQKFGcwfLWunRFh999l2nWRk80AbJy3TUNxGXa4 )
(Get 10% OFF)

Free yourself from the worries of running a website.

We’ll manage all the technicalities, like WordPress updates,
backups, security monitoring, uptime monitoring, and more…

With our WordPress maintenance service, we’ll handle everything
behind the scenes, so you can focus on your core business and
spend time where it matters.

3. Premium WordPress Support 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tq7LFgpvr-TD_5lqlxkDQqyDmcs5VKHh7iKfFjqHID4 )
(Get 10% OFF)

Struggling with WordPress website issues you can’t fix?

Don’t panic, get emergency support now!

Our team of experts can fix any WordPress issue quickly and
reliably.

Remember… This limited-time sale expires on 6th Dec 2024. Here’s
the coupon code: 24BFCM

That’s all for today!

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
